Loading rules: Do not reference LoadOptions unless you need to open an encrypted document; the example does not require it.
Saving/Export rules: No additional code is required to preserve form fields – Aspose.Words retains them when saving to PDF.
Use `HtmlFixedSaveOptions.ExportFormFields = true` to export interactive form controls in HTML.
Use the correct SaveFormat enum value – plain‑text is SaveFormat.Text, not SaveFormat.Txt.
Use OoxmlSaveOptions.Password to encrypt a DOCX file on save.
Save each variant to a separate file path to avoid overwriting previous results.
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Keep the `using Aspose.Words.Drawing;` directive because TextWatermarkOptions resides in that namespace.
